title: FDE Bridge Configuration
description: Configures which AI FDE tools are enabled, approval mode, and launch mode for automated sessions

tools.description: Tool toggles for the FDE session. Set to true to enable, false to disable.

approvalMode.description: auto-approve-branch: auto-approve actions on a branch; auto-approve-unbranched: auto-approve all; require-approval: require human approval for each action

launchMode.description: Which FDE workspace mode to launch in

branchName.description: Optional branch name to use in the FDE session
